title: angelica genuflexa
intro: Angelica genuflexa, also known as Wild Angelica, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and diuretic effects, which help relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Angelica genuflexa can be prepared into teas, infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, allowing for a range of herbal preparations to harness its therapeutic properties.
